CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. HUD-1 Line 502. The sum of all of the settlement fees paid by the seller at closing. Also called Settlement Charges. Previous help text instructed users to subtract Broker Commission. If you were subtracting Broker Commission prior to v1.10, please update this field to correct old files. Contact HomeKeeper staff with any questions.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: HUD-1 Line 502. The sum of all of the settlement fees paid by the seller at closing. Also called Settlement Charges.
CustomField.label: Seller's Closing Costs
